EV-Q8CIC40V.title: 03-photo-log.pdf
EV-Q8CIC40V.description: The evidence item is a PDF titled "03-photo-log.pdf," authored by Officer Kenneth Okafor, related to homicide case PBPD-2025-088142, created on March 27, 2026. It contains the crime scene photo log documenting pertinent images from the investigation.

EV-FCYRXROI.title: cctv_snapshot.png
EV-FCYRXROI.description: An outdoor street scene at night with a person running towards the camera. The street is lined with buildings and parked cars. There is a timestamp overlay in the image.

EV-UT5Q8MB6.title: 35-bar-records.pdf
EV-UT5Q8MB6.description: The evidence item titled "35-bar-records.pdf" is a PDF document containing transaction records from the Rusty Anchor Bar, relevant to the homicide case PBPD-2025-088142, overseen by Officer Diane Tran. The document was created on March 28, 2026.

EV-HUP2BUTT.title: crime_scene_photo_1.png
EV-HUP2BUTT.description: The image shows a disordered bar interior with broken glass and overturned furniture on a wooden floor. There is a noticeable bloodstain on the floor, suggesting a violent event.

EV-FCTFTVSU.title: Screenshot 2026-03-27 at 9.41.04 PM.png
EV-FCTFTVSU.description: The scene depicts a dimly lit bar interior with overturned stools and a large blood stain on the wooden floor. Various shattered glass and bottles are scattered around the area. The bar counter runs along the left side, lined with numerous bottles and glasses. The atmosphere suggests recent chaos or violence.

EV-KNDLJCIY.title: 07-officer-martin-statement.pdf
EV-KNDLJCIY.description: This evidence item is a PDF document titled "07-officer-martin-statement.pdf," which contains the statement of Officer James Martin related to the homicide case PBPD-2025-088142, dated March 28, 2026.

EV-DXP1XN2X.title: 08-detective-case-notes.pdf
EV-DXP1XN2X.description: Evidence item titled "08-detective-case-notes.pdf" is a PDF document containing case notes related to a homicide investigation, managed by Officer Renee Broussard under case number PBPD-2025-088142, dated March 28, 2026.

EV-NQP6Y4VH.title: 11-witness-shannon-obrien-initial.pdf

EV-NQP6Y4VH.description: This PDF document titled "11-witness-shannon-obrien-initial.pdf" contains the initial witness statement provided by Shannon O'Brien related to homicide case PBPD-2025-088142, and was processed on March 30, 2026, by Officer Renee Broussard.

EV-0U30GJP4.title: Screenshot 2026-04-15 at 10.15.16 AM.png
EV-0U30GJP4.description: A slightly blurred image of a person running on a sidewalk in an urban area. The scene is captured by a surveillance camera positioned above the sidewalk. The person is in motion, wearing casual clothing and the sidewalk is lined with buildings on the left and parked cars on the right. There is a garbage bin and trash visible along the street.

EV-ADF79PQ4.title: Screenshot 2026-04-15 at 10.57.37 AM.png
EV-ADF79PQ4.description: The image shows a man in a red shirt running towards the camera on a suburban sidewalk during twilight. The scene appears to be captured by a doorbell camera.

EV-3VUDMP17.title: Incident report.png
EV-3VUDMP17.description: An incident report from the City of Riverdale Police Department regarding a suspicious person or possible trespass. The report includes details about the incident, call information, and a narrative by the officer. A blurred image from a Ring doorbell camera shows a male figure approaching a front door.
EV-3VUDMP17.text_visible: CITY OF RIVERDALE POLICE DEPARTMENT, INCIDENT REPORT, Case # 24-041515-1932, REPORT DATE / TIME 04/25/2024 09:12 AM, INCIDENT TYPE Suspicious Person / Possible Trespass, 1234 Oakwood Dr, DISPATCH TIME 04/24/2024 07:44 PM, INCIDENT OFFENSE N/A, RED short sleeve shirt, dark pants, SHORT DARK HAIR, MOUSTACHE
